name: Human4K: A Large-Scale 4K Multi-View Mocap Dataset for Whole-Body 3D Human Reconstruction
summary: arXiv:2607.13646v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent advances in 3D human reconstruction have improved overall performance, yet current models still fail in the most challenging real-world scen...
description: arXiv:2607.13646v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent advances in 3D human reconstruction have improved overall performance, yet current models still fail in the most challenging real-world scenarios. They often produce unstable geometry, inaccurate limb articulation and unreliable predictions under depth ambiguity or self-occlusion. A key reason is that existing datasets still lack the comb...
author: Tianshun Han, Ziyu Shi, Lijian Liu, Ajian Liu, Benjia Zhou, Hugo Jair Escalante, Yanyan Liang, Sergio Escalera, Zhen Lei, Jun Wan
